title: Fantasie II - Lite
description: A performance-optimized version of Fantasie II — fewer mods, same legacy.
body:
## Fantasie II (Lite)

**Fantasie II (Lite)** is a streamlined version of the original Fantasie II modpack, created for better compatibility and performance — especially for Modrinth users.

Due to licensing and hosting restrictions, the following mods could not be included in this version:
Mowzie’s Mobs, Astral Sorcery, BiblioCraft, Thaumcraft, Primitive Mobs, BuildCraft, and others.

This results in the removal of some magical systems, complex mobs, and certain decorative or performance-heavy features. However, the core experience of *Fantasie* remains intact — a world in ruins, powerful magic rising once more, and a final hero called to restore balance.

> 🔗 Looking for the **full experience**?  
> 👉 [Play Fantasie II on CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/fantasie-ii)  
> 👉 [Or get the full version on Modrinth (Unlisted)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fantasie-ii)

---

### 🧙 What’s still included?

The world of Fantasie lies in ruins.  
Once, mighty heroes ruled the land, building majestic castles and mastering the art of magic. Among them was a powerful mage — a peacemaker — who conquered enemy fortresses not for power, but to bring balance and unity to the realm. For a time, it worked.

But many years have passed since the era of Fantasie I.  
The castles have crumbled, reclaimed by nature or seized by darkness. The mage’s staff is lost. His wisdom, forgotten. The fragile peace he fought for has long since shattered.

But not everything is lost.

A spark of hope still glimmers in the darkness.  
You are the last of a long-forgotten line. The world calls for a new hero — one who can restore the harmony between magic and machine, and defy the growing shadow that now blankets the land.

---

### 🛠️ Technology and Progress

- Harness the power of **Mekanism** to build advanced machines, process resources, and fortify yourself against the chaos.  
- With **Thermal Expansion** and **Immersive Engineering**, engineer vast systems to make survival sustainable — and powerful.

### 🔮 Magic and Mysteries

- Rediscover forgotten spells with **Electroblob’s Wizardry**, and recover ancient tomes lost in time.  
- Use **Botania** to channel the life force of plants, or delve into **Blood Magic** for strength drawn from sacrifice.

### 🗺️ Exploration and Adventure

- Venture through mystical dimensions such as the **Twilight Forest** and the **Aether**, each filled with secrets, challenges, and rewards.  
- Navigate ruins and dangerous strongholds from **Dungeon Tactics** and **Chocolate Quest**, long untouched by mortal hands.

### 🛡️ Gear and Survival

- Arm yourself with unique and powerful items.  
- Through **Artifacts** and **Curios**, discover ancient relics and unlock new abilities to survive what lies beyond the veil of light.

## 📜 Credits

These mods are part of Fantasie II and require attribution. Many thanks to the mod authors!

- [**BiblioCraft**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/bibliocraft) – Adds stylish furniture and functional storage options.
- [**Waddles**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/waddles) – Adds cute penguins to cold biomes for more atmosphere.
- [**Hexxit Gear**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/hexxit-gear) – Brings back classic Hexxit-style armor sets.
- [**Dynamic Trees for Atum 2**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dynamic-trees-atum-2) – Adds dynamic trees to the Atum dimension.
- [**Mowzie’s Mobs**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mowzies-mobs) – Intelligent cinematic mobs with unique behavior and animations.
- [**LunatriusCore**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/lunatriuscore) – Required core mod for several utility-based mods.
- [**Astral Sorcery**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/astral-sorcery) – A complex magic system based on starlight and constellations.
- [**MultiMob Library**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/multi-mob-core) – Shared mob dependency library for other creature mods.
- [**Dynamic Trees for Thaumcraft**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dttc) – Adds dynamic magical trees for Thaumcraft.
- [**BuildCraft**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/buildcraft) – Adds pipes, engines, and automation from the early modding days.
- [**Straw Golem Reborn**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/strawgolem-reborn) – A tiny straw golem that helps harvest crops.
- [**Guilt Trip**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/guilt-trip) – Adds morality and consequences for killing passive mobs.
- [**WeissCore**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/weisscore) – Core library used by various Weiss-based mods.
- [**Just A Few Fish**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/just-a-few-fish) – Adds animated, swimmable fish to Minecraft waters.
- [**Primitive Mobs**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/primitive-mobs) – Adds a variety of mobs with drops and behavior similar to vanilla.
- [**AbyssalCraft Integration**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/abyssalcraft-integration) – Connects AbyssalCraft to other mod systems.
- [**Dynamic Trees Thaumcraft Addon**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dynamic-trees-thaumcraft-addons) – More Thaumcraft-based tree integration.
- [**RFTDimTweak**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/rftools-dimension-tweaker) – Compatibility tweaks for RFTools Dimensions.
- [**Bee Barker**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/bee-barker) – Adds a barking bee as a humorous pet mob.
- [**Baubles**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/baubles) – Adds extra equipment slots like rings and amulets.
- [**Thaumcraft**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/thaumcraft) – The legendary arcane research magic system.

---

Fantasie II Lite is lighter, faster, and more accessible — but still true to its core.  
The world is watching. The ruins are whispering. The magic is waiting.

**Answer the call. Reclaim the past.**  
**Become the hero Fantasie desperately needs.**
